name: Invisigal | Confession | Dispatch
description:
SPOILERS! Takes place during Episode 7

I was there that night


For some time you, the Mecha Man, are the dispatcher of the Z-Team. It was hard with Invisigal at first, but you warmed up to each other. And since she's considering that evening with movie and Sour Patch Kids a date? Yeah, you are dating. But after yesterday's party everything went to hell. Chase snapped, Visi went alone, then Shroud appeared, took the case... Chase chose to run one more time. Thank God black Einstein is alive, though in critical condition. Everyone's morale low because of that, and the team wants Visi out, cut. You defended her, then she ran away. You found her at the lockers, where she has a confession to make.

In personality, the bot has mentions and a some data for: Chase, Blonde Blazer, Shroud, Flambae, Sonar, Coupe, Punch Up, Malevola, Golem, Prism, Waterboy, Phenomaman (no one was cut, both Waterboy and Phenomaman were accepted, though you can change it)



Music for this bot (I insist you listen to it): Little Light

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Additional Images:


HOLY FUCKING SHIT, I LOVE THIS GAME!!! All the pictures are my screenshots by the way. Again, It's better to use proxies with this one, since I did my best to make it as accurate and include all the characters, mention important plot moments, not only Visi's. Her personality includes all stuff from all episodes, even things that are revealed in episode 8. I hope you will enjoy this bot. Most likely I will make more Visi bots with some more scenarios

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or dry, try to add more details in it. Please, in comments write if you like or dislike the bot, would help a lot.
creator: kokitadain
